items.title: At least 9 dead in Madagascar as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hits the Indian Ocean island
items.description: Authorities in Madagascar say at least nine people have died when buildings collapsed as Tropical Cyclone Gezani hit the Indian Ocean island

items.title: WATCH:  American families travel to cheer on Team USA at Olympics in Italy
items.description: After Covid restrictions kept loved ones away four years ago, many athletes are now grateful to be surrounded by support.

items.title: WATCH:  Grandson pilots 88-year-old grandmother's 1st flight
items.description: Frances Dahlke took to the skies for her first ever flight with a special person piloting the plane -- her grandson.
